kill_switch.note: Owner or system drops STOP flag; engine halts all demo cycles. Trip-proof test still required before live.

daily_stop.behavior: ntfy warning alert when realized daily loss reaches 15 USD; halt all demo trading for the day at 30 USD

max_loss.behavior: halt all operation and require owner reset when cumulative drawdown reaches limit; matches governor max_drawdown threshold 0.15

surfaces: ntfy owner alert channel (topic masked, gitignored)

note: Owner-editable demo-scope safety thresholds. Editing this file does NOT move money and does NOT arm live trading. Brake trip-proof tests remain required before any live arming.
